Flexible staffing solutions to scale your business

TrueKnack delivers customized staffing services designed to meet complex hiring needs with speed and accuracy. Leveraging an extensive network, we provide scalable staffing across tech and non-tech roles, including volume hiring, lateral moves, senior leadership, and diversity-focused recruitment.

IT Staffing

Agile Tech Teams, Ready on Demand

Build specialized technology teams with agility. We provide end-to-end IT staffing solutions, from setting up Micro Capability Centers to full Build-Operate-Transfer (BOT) models. Access our bench of pre-vetted tech professionals to accelerate your digital transformation and meet critical project timelines.

Key Models:

  • Organizational Development: Complete facility & talent buildout for R&D and tech operations.
  • Micro Capability Centers: Agile, smaller-scale centers tailored to specialized functions.
  • Build Operate Transfer (BOT): We build and operate the capability, transferring it when you're ready.
General Staffing

Unlock scaled growth for non-tech teams

General Staffing solutions that adapt to your evolving business needs. We source and deploy skilled professionals across finance, HR, legal, sales, marketing, and administrative roles efficiently, ensuring high-quality hires aligned with your organizational culture.

Comprehensive Coverage:

Candidate Selection
Background Verification
HR Procedure Execution
POSH & Behavioral Training
Payroll Management
Compliance Readiness
Why Choose Us

The TrueKnack Advantage

Access to our extensive talent pool

Trained professionals from our network, across a variety of industries and roles.

Immediate joiners

Agile hiring models designed to deliver candidates within 15 days of request, complete with pre-vetted talent on standby.

Data-driven sourcing

Our data-supported sourcing ensures precise search and shortlisting - mapped directly to performance and delivery KPIs.

Compliance readiness

Robust statutory governance backed by centralized legal and compliance oversight.

The Knack of Finding True Talent.
Your strategic partner connecting exceptional talent
with outstanding opportunities.
